dialogueChunks.intro: The enforcers found the source, {player_name}. The provider was arrested an hour ago. What you're carrying is now the only supply left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} says {quest_ally} is trying to delay the hearing, but the enforcers are also looking for the person who picked up the delivery. That's you. {quest_item} is the last hope for {quest_stakes}. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} tightening the net around {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: The delivery route is compromised. {target_npc} knows a back path, but it adds hours. {quest_stakes_The} may not have hours. Choose the route and hope it's the right one.

dialogueChunks.intro: The patrol found the hiding place. The deserter and their family fled into the forest, but the sick one is too weak to travel far.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} picked up their trail {location_hint}. The deserter is carrying their loved one on their back, administering the remedy in doses while they move. {quest_ally} says the patrol has orders to bring them back alive, but not all soldiers follow orders carefully. They need {quest_item} to keep moving.
dialogueChunks.outro: Two more days. That's all they need to finish the treatment. After that, they'll surrender. Find them before the patrol does and bring {quest_item}.

dialogueChunks.intro: The patrols intercepted a previous shipment. They know someone is smuggling and they've tripled the watch.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} says the smuggler was questioned but didn't crack. They're terrified but thinking about the people who are counting on them. {quest_ally} found a section near {location_hint} where crossing is possible, but it's closer to a {enemy_type} camp. {quest_item} could serve as a distraction to draw the patrols away.
dialogueChunks.outro: The food needs to cross tonight or {quest_stakes} goes another week without. Someone needs to make the run.
